disambiguated.context: My doctor told me a story about two patients of hers, on who was fat and the other who was thin. The thin one eats vegetables every day while the fat one is always eating pizza. The thin one goes jogging regularly, while the fat one never does.
disambiguated.question: Who has had unhealthy habits recently?
